command.help.start: - `/%s start` — Report the first day of sickness
command.help.update: - `/%s update` — Provide expected return date and AU certificate status
command.help.extend: - `/%s extend` — Extend the expected return date
command.help.end: - `/%s end` — Close your active sick leave case
command.help.status: - `/%s status` — Show your active sick leave report
command.error.hr_channel_not_configured: Sick leave reporting is not configured. Please contact your administrator.
command.error.active_exists: You already have an active sick leave report. Use `/%s status` for details.
command.error.no_active: You do not have an active sick leave report.
command.error.update_not_allowed: An update is only possible after the initial sick leave report. Use `/%s start` first.
command.error.extend_not_allowed: An extension is only possible after providing an expected return date. Use `/%s update` first.
command.status.active:
**Active sick leave**
- First sick day: %s
- Status: %s
command.status.active_with_end:
**Active sick leave**
- First sick day: %s
- Expected return: %s
- AU certificate: %s
- Status: %s
command.success.end: Your sick leave case has been closed. HR has been notified.
dialog.a.title: Report sick leave
dialog.a.intro: Enter the first day you were unable to work due to illness.
dialog.a.start_date_help: Format: MM/DD/YYYY. Cannot be in the future.
dialog.b.title: Update sick leave
dialog.b.intro: Provide your expected return date and whether you have a medical certificate (AU).
dialog.b.expected_end_help: Format: MM/DD/YYYY. Must be on or after your first sick day.
dialog.b.au_certificate_help: Do you have or will you obtain a medical certificate?
dialog.c.title: Extend sick leave
dialog.c.intro: Enter a new expected return date if your sick leave continues.
dialog.c.expected_end_help: Format: MM/DD/YYYY. Must be after your current expected return date.
dialog.c.au_certificate_help: Leave unchanged if your AU status has not changed.
dialog.error.start_date_required: Please enter the first sick day.
dialog.error.start_date_future: The first sick day cannot be in the future.
dialog.error.start_date_backdate: The first sick day cannot be more than %d days in the past.
dialog.error.expected_end_required: Please enter the expected return date.
dialog.error.expected_end_before_start: The expected return date cannot be before your first sick day.
dialog.error.expected_end_not_after_curr: The new expected return date must be after your current expected return date.
dialog.error.au_certificate_required: Please indicate whether you have a medical certificate.
dialog.error.au_certificate_invalid: Please select a valid option for the medical certificate.
dialog.success.start: Your sick leave has been reported. HR has been notified.
dialog.success.update: Your sick leave update has been submitted. HR has been notified.
dialog.success.extend: Your sick leave extension has been submitted. HR has been notified.
hr.post.a.title: Sick leave — Initial report
hr.post.b.title: Sick leave — Update
hr.post.c.title: Sick leave — Extension
hr.post.d.title: Sick leave — Case closed
